_comment: Human-readable reference for the seed that claude-kimi writes ONCE into the ISOLATED Kimi K3 config dir ($HOME/.config/claude-kimi) on first launch (never overwrites your edits). The launcher EMBEDS an equivalent seed (so it survives deployment to ~/bin) — this file is the documented copy; keep the two in sync. Deliberately self-contained: it does NOT load ~/.claude/statusline.sh or any Max hook — that statusline calls claude-accounts and assumes Anthropic OAuth quota, which is meaningless on a metered Kimi endpoint. Keeping this bare is the isolation guarantee. See docs/KIMI_METERED_INTEGRATION.md.

statusLine.command: printf '🌙 Kimi K3 · metered (your $, ~$3/$15 per MTok) · isolated from the 4 Max accounts'
